videos.title: Grand Finale Summit 2 Senja | Ski Classics Pro Tour HIGHLIGHTS | 03/30/2025 | beIN SPORTS
videos.description:
Don’t miss the best of the Grand Finale Summit 2 Senja in the Ski Classics Pro Tour. #SkiClassicsProTour 

Catch the latest highlights of Ligue 1🇫🇷, Turkish Süper Lig🇹🇷, 
Copa Libertadores🏆, Copa Sudamericana🥇 on our YouTube channel.
Follow the latest news on beIN SPORTS.com and stream all our matches on our beIN SPORTS CONNECT app or on our beIN XTRA channels.

videos.title: Emilie Fleten 3rd place Summit 2 Senja & Climb Bib winner I Ski Classics Pro Tour 2024/2025
videos.transcript:
Welcome Emilia Fatan and big races the
third place today and also the winner of
the climb bib. Thank you. Thank you. Uh
can you please firstly tell us about the
race from Baros to Finness today? Oh it
was really hard from the start for me. I
was like almost uh got got dropped uh
several times. Uh but
uh and I in the Magdalas I was like
fourth just a little bit behind but uh
it was better in the end up to the
climb. I reached Stina, but she was so
much better than me downhill. So yeah,
uh I need to practice down my downhill
skills, but uh I'm happy being on the
podium. And talking about the season on
whole, can you just give us a short
summarize of the season from Basan to
the finish here in Sam? It's been really
up and down. It's been some really good
races and maybe not so so good races. So
yeah, it's h been really up and down. Uh
but uh it's easy to remember the down.
So I when I'm uh finished with this, I'm
going to go home and appreciate the good
things about the season as well. And
talking about next season, now this was
the last pro tour event. Now it's summer
break. Will you compete more or how will
you prepare for next season? Oh, we'll
see. Uh I think I'm going to take a
break now and just enjoy life and then
uh of course start training in the
summer and do roller ski races and
hopefully be prepared for the next
season. Yeah, great Ailia and
congratulations to a great season. Thank
you.

videos.title: Fischer Nordic l Summit 2 Senja Stage Intro Emil Persson 23l24
videos.description:
While the World Cup season is already over for 23l24, the Ski Classics series still has three spectacular races in the far north on the program. Emil Persson gives an insight into the special features that await the athletes at the Reistadloppet and Summit2Senja two days in a row next weekend.

Moving pictures from @Ski Classics Official

FOLLOW FISCHER SPORTS ON SOCIAL 
▲ Fischer Ski on Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/fischerski
▲ Fischer Nordic on Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/fischernordic
▲ Fischer Ski on Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/fischerski 
▲ Fischer Nordic on Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/fischernordic

▲ Visit our Website: http://www.fischersports.com 

SKIING IS OUR LIFE.
Fischer’s vision is to be the athlete’s number one choice through outstanding products, made for everlasting moments and new levels of individual performance. Our mission is to enable athletes to enjoy their sport and excel to the next level by introducing the most innovative, reliable, and easy to use products.

For us, skiing is not a lifestyle. It’s life. #livetoski
